one_time_description: Corrections aux exercices antérieurs liées à l'analyse des états financiers des années antérieures des différents bailleurs de fonds
economic_notes: The combined entity includes Fonds d'exploitation, Fonds d'entreprise - loyer, Fonds d'habitation, Fonds d'entreprise - marché d'alimentation, Tourisme Manawan, and Centre sportif et culturel de Manawan (arena). Pension retirement charge of 1,702,548 in 2021.
notes: Financial statements are for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Combined statements include multiple funds and non-profit organizations. Prior year audit (March 31, 2020) had a qualified opinion from predecessor auditor. Corrections to prior periods totaling 992,027 recorded. Tangible capital assets include both regular (46,911,490) and housing fund (5,777,956) for total of 52,689,446. Long-term debt includes SCHL mortgages guaranteed by ISC. Net debt position of 8,119,335. Deferred revenue increased significantly from 4,394,677 to 11,982,873. New long-term loans contracted during year. Reserve shortfall of 448,805 for replacement and operating reserves.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
